subcodes.first_line: O friends! Reflect upon that which hath appeared and come to pass. The Desired One is manifest, and all are His servants [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دوستان تفکر نمائید در آنچه ظاهر شده و وارد گشته مطلوب ظاهر و جمیع عباد
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @idle fancies; lust and passion, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @praise and encouragement
